{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323150852AFAD096B25822D5D034E"}"},"total":67},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604303729338696472","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，虽然有很多和电视剧剧情一样但是侧面改变了很多人的结局，弥补了很多遗憾还是值得一看的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770518492,"group_id":"7582528355501624382","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwvqEUWrxVlLvAyt0c3Zg1Q=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"50569603414","user_name":"六盘山的火炎狮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50569603414","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582528355501624382","book_info":{"abstract":"横店小演员许忠义穿越平行世界，成为同名同姓的许忠义。
发现这个世界竟然是融合了渗透、风筝、潜伏等谍战剧的影视世界。
卧底不是人干的，狗都不……
干，干的就是卧底！
还是双面卧底！
开局就自曝卧底身份，成功打入军统内部！
从军统店小二，一路发展成军统财神爷！
齐公子：“许忠义百分百是卧底！我拿头发誓！”
李维恭：“你见过会自曝的卧底吗？你见过这么会赚钱的卧底吗？”
郑耀先：“原来卧底可以这么做？学会了！”
余则成：“他这钞能力理论，比我的玉座金佛理论还先进啊！我得学习学习。”
李涯：“他一个卧底，怎么成了军统信仰了？”
